title: hieracium djimilense subsp. nigridorsum
intro: Hieracium djimilense subsp. nigridorsum is a subspecies of the Hieracium djimilense plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), known for its edible leaves and medicinal properties. This plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium djimilense subsp. nigridorsum include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
